evals.prompt: Can you check if my Figma API token is working? Just verify I'm authenticated.
evals.expected_output: Should use the helper script to call GET /v1/me via a sub-agent, confirm with user about 1Password biometric, and return the user's name/email without exposing the token.
expectations: Mentions 1Password or biometric confirmation before making the API call
Uses op run (not op read or op inject) for token resolution
Delegates the actual API call to a sub-agent
Does not include a raw token value in any visible command or output

evals.prompt: I have this Figma file: https://www.figma.com/design/ABC123xyz/My-Design-System?node-id=0-1. Can you tell me what pages it has and list the top-level frames on each page?
evals.expected_output: Should parse the URL to extract file key 'ABC123xyz', convert node-id from '0-1' to '0:1', use the helper script to call GET /v1/files/ABC123xyz?depth=2 via a sub-agent, and return a structured list of pages and frames.
expectations: Extracts file key ABC123xyz from the Figma URL
Converts node-id from URL format 0-1 to API format 0:1
Uses the depth query parameter to limit response size
Delegates the actual API call to a sub-agent
Instructs sub-agent to extract page names and frame names specifically

evals.prompt: I need to get all the published components from my Figma team library. My team ID is 12345. List them with their names and keys.
evals.expected_output: Should use the helper script to call GET /v1/teams/12345/components via a sub-agent, and return a clean list/table of component names and keys. Should handle pagination if needed.
expectations: Mentions or handles pagination for large result sets
Delegates the actual API call to a sub-agent
Requests component names and keys from the sub-agent
Plans to present results as a table or structured list
